title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in East Flatbush | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in East Flatbush, Brooklyn. Safe, humane bat control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Dealing with bats in your East Flatbush home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides safe, humane bat removal and exclusion services tailored to Brooklyn's unique residential and commercial properties. Our licensed specialists use proven methods to remove bats and prevent their return, protecting your property and family from health risks.
whyUs: With over a decade serving East Flatbush residents, we understand the specific bat challenges facing this diverse Brooklyn neighborhood's mix of single-family homes, multi-unit buildings, and commercial spaces. Our team provides fast response times, uses eco-friendly exclusion techniques, and offers comprehensive warranties on all bat exclusion work.
localContext: East Flatbush's historic homes along Albemarle Road and the many pre-war apartment buildings near Kings Highway often feature attics, eaves, and architectural details that attract roosting bats. From properties near Brooklyn College to the residential streets surrounding East 98th Street, we've helped countless East Flatbush property owners resolve bat infestations safely and permanently.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in East Flatbush?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in East Flatbush typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, entry points, and the complexity of your property. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Brooklyn legal and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, our bat removal methods comply with all New York State wildlife regulations and humane treatment standards. We never harm bats—instead, we use one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave safely but prevent re-entry, then seal all access points to keep them out permanently.

faqs.question: What are signs of bats in my East Flatbush home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or squeaking sounds at dusk or dawn, dark staining around entry points, small droppings (guano) in attics or near walls, and seeing bats enter or exit your property at twilight. You may also notice a musky odor in affected areas. If you spot any of these signs, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take?
faqs.answer: Most bat exclusion projects in East Flatbush take 1-3 days for initial installation, but the complete process spans 3-7 days to ensure all bats have exited safely. We cannot perform exclusions during maternity season (May-August) when flightless baby bats are present, so timing is important. After exclusion, we seal all entry points and provide cleanup services if needed.
